Taken together, this is the slower line of development rather than the headline turn of events. The clearer reading is that the strain is real, and the opening is still worth following. There is a practical thread worth following through. The place most worth returning to is Stars House: convert vision into steps. This is where reflection tends to land most honestly.

rows.finalText: One workable lens for "What is the next right step in my calling" is Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. With the Dog in the past, the reading shows where things already stand, and the picture is already being shaped by trusted support and the steadiness it brings. Dog often points to steady support, loyal alliance, and the kind of dependable help that shows whether the path can actually hold in real life in your calling. The right path foundation here — Dog shows the confirmation that comes from those who know you best. At the pivot, Present places the House at the center, making this the point where the reading can shift. House tends to draw your calling toward base structure, fixed conditions, and the foundations that have to hold before anything else can stretch. House at the pivot names the right path pressure directly: the foundation that confirms you are where you need to be. Future closes with the Coffin, and the directional message is an outdated pattern ready to be released gracefully when the pivot receives consistent attention. Coffin often points to the part of the old path that has already finished, and the rest that is needed before anything genuinely new can take root in your calling. Looking ahead in terms of right path, Coffin points toward recognising that a path has ended and the next one has not yet appeared. The House is the real hinge in this spread. Strengthen routines and boundaries — that is the clearest move this reading points to.
